panels.label: Carrier screening — ACMG SF v3.2 (full example)
panels.description: Report scope = HGNC symbols from the ACMG BED (column 4), applied after annotation. Set backbone_bed to your exome/capture BED in production.

panels.label: Carrier screening — demo subset (~small gene list)
panels.description: Small gene list via interpretation_genes_file; disease_bed is optional metadata. Production: use your exome backbone_bed + a curated gene list file or inline interpretation_genes.

panels.label: Proactive health — example
panels.description: Same pattern as demo: gene list file + optional BED paths; set backbone_bed to your exome in production.

panels.label: Pharmacogenomics (PGx) — example
panels.description: Example PGx genes (CPIC-style); expand or replace with interpretation_genes_file.
